The '''Battle of [[Exocron]]''' was a battle fought between [[Rei'Kas]] and his pirate fleet against the [[Exocron Combined Air-Space Fleet]], the [[Aing-Tii/Legends|Aing-Tii]] and the ''[[Wild Karrde]]''.

==The battle==
The battle started and ended after the [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] fleet chased the fleeing Exocron fleet too close to the world, causing them to be wiped out to the very last by the Aing-Tii monks and their ships.

{{Battle-stub}}
